title: FarMoreFood
description: Adds a lot of food to Minecraft, using just a datapack and resource pack.
body:
**Adds over 80 food items to Minecraft: Java Edition, using just a datapack. A Bedrock addon version is now available on Curseforge: [Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/farmorefood-bedrock).**

You can get food using the following command (replacing "foodname" with the name of the food): ``` /function farmorefood:give/foodname ``` Crafting recipes will be added soon.
![Items 1-54 of the FarMoreFood Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a05c4b415fe4c79638cda8959e55251834eca9a2.png)
![Items 55-81 of the FarMoreFood Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cef0d1a68625f100db8cd65bfeba8711df8d9f5.png)
